author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Investigating the Conv2d backward to understand the GPU integration path. The forward does im2col→cuBLAS on GPU. The backward stores the im2col columns as Vec<T> on CPU (self.cols), so backward has to work on CPU. The fix needs to either (1) store cols on GPU during forward, or (2) restructure backward to recompute im2col on GPU.
